api_key.description: Hellobaton API key, sent as the api_key query parameter on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: Hellobaton API base URL, e.g. https://<company>.hellobaton.com/api. Legacy derives this from a bare company subdomain; this bundle requires the full URL directly since the engine has no config-derivation mechanism for base URLs (see docs.md Known limits).
